title: G7 Cyber Expert Group Reconnection Framework Best Practice
body: "The G7 Cyber Expert Group (CEG) Framework for Reconnection Best Practice provides sector-level guidance to assist jurisdictions and their institutions in developing their own reconnection frameworks for restoring access to an organisation that has suffered a material cyber incident. The guidance is not prescriptive and can be tailored and adapted to institutions of different maturities and complexities. "
